scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "yellow,cyan" "cd backend && npx ts-node --esm server.ts" "cd petday---ai-pet-pov-insights && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../petday---ai-pet-pov-insights && VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm run build
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "yellow,cyan" "cd backend && npm start" "cd petday---ai-pet-pov-insights && npm run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000 --strictPort"
scripts.start:local: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../petday---ai-pet-pov-insights && npm install
